campaign haba oct beauty and personal care

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Dimethiconol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Dimethicone, Perfume, Sodium Chloride, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Zinc Pyrithione, Sodium Salicylate, Sodium Hydroxide, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Citric Acid, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, TEA-Sulfate, Zinc Sulfate, Laureth-23, Poloxamer 407, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Sodium Benzoate, Laureth-4, Sodium Polynaphthalenesulfonate, PEG-4, Xanthan Gum, Cellulose Gum, DMDM Hydantoin, Potassium Sorbate, Lysine HCl, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, Methylisothiazolinone
metaData.Key Information:
• Soothes the scalp to calm itch and remove dandruff
• Nourishes and strengthens hair to prevent hair fall
• Professional quality formulation: Specially formulated with tea tree oil & ZPTO
• Tea tree oil: Unclogs dandruff from hair follicles and nourishes hair roots
• ZPTO: Chemical with anti-fungal properties for dandruff
• Use scalp care daily for no dandruff (no visible flakes, with regular use) and reduced hair fall (due to breakage) every day
• Suitable for dandruff and hair fall
metaData.Preparation:
1. Brush before wash - Gently brush to detangle hair before washing
2. Rinse pre-shampoo - Rinse thoroughly with warm water and do a light scalp massage to remove dirt and grease before shampoo, this allows quicker lathering of shampoo as well
3. Shampoo - Apply to wet hair, gentle massage to work into a lather and rinse thoroughly
4. Lightly squeeze the shampoo from roots to ends and rinse thoroughly
5. Conditioner - Squeeze conditioner into your palm and rub hands together to help distribute evenly
6. Apply conditioner to wet hair from mid-lengths to ends, leave for 2-3 minutes and rinse
7. Follow with hair mask and rinse completely
8. Rinse & Dry - Rinse completely, be extremely gentle when towel-drying to reduce damage caused by friction
9. Style/Protect - Finish by styling with your favourite TRESemme products
10. For protection from heat styling tools, use keratin smooth heat protect hair spray before you styleCaution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water

metaData.Ingredients: Water / Aqua / Eau, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Lauryl Hydroxysultaine, Sorbitol, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance / Parfum, Caffeine, Maltitol, Citric Acid, Polyquaternium-10, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Ppg-3 Caprylyl Ether, Caprylyl Glycol, Sodium Salicylate, Dipropylene Glycol, Sodium Sulfite, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Metaphosphate, Climbazole, Ethylhexylglycerin, Glycerin, Tetrasodium Edta, Hydrolyzed Extensin, Dextrin, Madecassoside, Butylene Glycol, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Rosa Damascena Flower Extract, Alcohol, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Tocopherol, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Potassium Chloride, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Camellia Sinensis Seed Oil, Torreya Nucifera Seed Oil, Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Root Extract, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol
metaData.Key Information:
Sensitive scalp care customized solution
• Hair strengthening and health
• Added anti-hair loss benefit
• Soothing care for scalp and hair stressed by external irritants
• Key ingredients:
- premium anti-aging ginseng from hair loss lab's 40-year legacy.
- Mfds-certified hair loss relief with the power of caffeine.
- Innovative rice-derived hydrolyzed extension for optimal hair health.
• Mild for scalp – low pH
• White floral fragrance
• Rich and dense foam for deep cleansing
metaData.Preparation:
How to use:
1. Release proper amount onto your hand and gently massage your hair and scalp.
2. After 2-3 minutes wash off with lukewarm water.


Warnings:
1. Wash off immediately when it gets into your eyes
2. Not washing off after usage can cause hairloss or bleaching
3. If abnormal symptoms or side effects such as red spots, swelling, or itching is noticed when using product or after use from direct sunlight, consult with physician
4. Limit use on broken or wounded skin
metaData.Storage Information:
1. Keep out of reach of children
2. Keep away from direct sunlight
3. When product is spilled on the floor, be cautious of slipperiness and immediately wipe it off with water.
